2197180.name: Business Heroes: Street Grub Soundtrack [Soundtrack]
2197180.description: You know what they say, variety is the spice of life... but not all spices are cool as cucumbers. If you're looking for some chill music that's butter smooth with a soft bounce of gaminess (because who doesn't want some gamey vibes while they unwind?), you'd love this album! The tempo is slow and steady, like a tortoise enjoying a warm bubble bath. It'll help slow your heart rate, relax your muscles, and leave you feeling like a sloth snuggled up in a cozy blanket.
